description: Joined African National Congress (ANC) and co-founded the ANC Youth League.
people_involved: Nelson Mandela, Walter Sisulu, Oliver Tambo

description: Led Defiance Campaign against unjust apartheid laws.
Arrested and later sentenced to five years for leaving the country illegally and inciting strike.
Rivonia Trial verdict; sentenced to life imprisonment.
Awarded the Nobel Peace Prize with F. W. de Klerk.
people_involved: Nelson Mandela, F. W. de Klerk

description: Inaugurated as President of South Africa.
